rawAssistant: Tomorrow's errands won't wait, but a traveler who leaves before dawn is best prepared for anything. Double-check that your road kit is still intact, especially the vials and twine – those can be lifesavers on a long journey. And don't forget to adjust your cloak's hem; I recall you mentioned it was a bit worn after last night's windstorm.
